# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-service-entry
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-virtual-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
  tls:
    mode: SIMPLE
  http:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: api.thirdparty.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-service-entry
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.external.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgresql
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-virtual-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.external.com
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: db.external.com
            port:
              number: 5432
